analysis.elliott_wave: Not applicable to gold, focusing on classical technical patterns and macro drivers.
analysis.momentum: Neutral momentum with RSI at 46.34, indicating a balanced market with no clear trend bias.
analysis.trade_plan: Consider buying on dips towards TV Pivot Support levels, targeting a bounce to TV Pivot Resistance levels. Monitor DXY and real yields for potential catalysts. Be cautious of a potential bearish breakout.
